name: General Nursing
description: Core nursing concepts, patient care fundamentals, and general medical knowledge

name: Pediatric Nursing
description: Nursing care for infants, children, and adolescents

name: Mental Health Nursing
description: Psychiatric nursing, mental health disorders, and therapeutic interventions

name: Anatomy & Physiology
description: Human body systems, structures, and physiological processes

name: Pharmacology
description: Drug classifications, medications, dosages, and nursing implications

name: Community Health
description: Public health, community nursing, and health promotion

name: Research & Ethics
description: Nursing research methods, ethical principles, and professional standards

name: Medical-Surgical Nursing
description: Pre-operative and post-operative care, surgical nursing procedures

name: Emergency Nursing
description: Emergency care, trauma management, and critical nursing interventions

name: Maternal & Child Health
description: Pregnancy, childbirth, postnatal care, and maternal health
